Anime & Manga

What I’m Watching

My personal anime tracking list. Ratings are based on story, art, and overall enjoyment.

Attack on Titan

Completed

Epic storytelling with mind-bending plot twists. One of the best anime I've watched.

9

Demon Slayer

Ongoing

Beautiful animation and compelling character development. Worth every episode.

8

A Place Further Than The Universe

Completed

Heartwarming story about friendship and adventure. Deeply inspirational.

9

Your Name

Completed

A romantic journey across time. Stunning visuals and emotional storytelling.

8

Steins;Gate

Completed

Complex time-travel narrative. Keeps you engaged until the very end.

9
